metadata.description: Kanban board for In-Store POS/Checkout System. Contains original epic task (as reference) and broken-down subtasks (1-2 day units). See ../KANBAN-BREAKDOWN-GUIDE.md for breakdown details.
metadata.note: This file contains the original epic task. Broken-down subtasks should be added based on KANBAN-BREAKDOWN-GUIDE.md

tasks.title: In-Store POS/Checkout System
tasks.description: Create point-of-sale checkout system for in-store sales including item scanning, payment processing, receipt generation, and sale recording.
tasks.userStory: As a store employee, I want to process in-store sales through a POS system so that I can complete customer transactions efficiently.
acceptanceCriteria: Given a sale is initiated, when employee adds items to cart, then items are displayed with quantities and prices
Given items in cart, when employee processes payment, then payment is recorded and inventory is decremented
Given a sale is completed, when finished, then sale record is created with all details (items, customer, payment, employee, timestamp)
Given receipt generation, when sale is completed, then receipt is generated and can be printed or emailed to customer
Given payment processing, when payment is processed, then payment method is recorded (cash, card, etc.) and change is calculated if needed
Given sale workflow, when processing, then system supports: add items, remove items, apply discounts, process payment, complete sale
Given offline mode, when internet is down, then sales can be processed offline and synced when connection is restored
tasks.businessValue: Core functionality for processing sales. Enables revenue generation and transaction recording.
tasks.technicalNotes: Create Sale and SaleItem tables. Implement cart functionality. Integrate with payment processor (Stripe for card payments). Generate receipts (PDF or thermal printer). Support offline mode with sync.
successMetrics: Sale processing time: <2 minutes average per transaction
Sale accuracy: 99%+ of sales recorded correctly
Offline sale sync: 100% of offline sales sync successfully
businessRules: Inventory is decremented immediately upon sale completion
Sales must include: items, quantities, prices, customer (optional), payment method, employee
Receipts must include: store info, sale date, items, totals, payment method
Sales can be processed offline and synced later
Payment methods: cash, credit card, debit card, store credit
tasks.note: This is the original epic task. The subtasks should be broken down into 1-2 day units based on KANBAN-BREAKDOWN-GUIDE.md
